patternCandidates.name: init()-based plugin registry with domain routing
patternCandidates.description: Single-method Extractor interface + global map + init() auto-registration + blank imports + universal fallback. 46 extractors, zero boilerplate.
patternCandidates.notes: Go-specific pattern. Principle universal but implementation not portable to Node/TS.

knowledgeCandidates.name: CI workflow generation from template
knowledgeCandidates.description: Node script generates 45 GitHub Actions workflows from single template. Per-extractor CI isolation.

knowledgeCandidates.name: Per-site CI isolation pattern
knowledgeCandidates.description: Each of 46 extractors has own CI workflow and README badge. Independent failure signals.

antiPatternCandidates.name: HARDCODED_CREDENTIALS_IN_SOURCE
antiPatternCandidates.description: Twitter bearer token and Weibo session cookie checked into git. Normalizes credential exposure.

antiPatternCandidates.name: DISABLED_TLS_VERIFICATION
antiPatternCandidates.description: InsecureSkipVerify: true on all HTTPS connections. Global MITM vulnerability.

antiPatternCandidates.name: DOCUMENTATION_ABSENT_FOR_CONTRIBUTORS
antiPatternCandidates.description: 46 extractors, 30 contributors, 23-line CONTRIBUTING.md, zero architecture docs.

cross_repo_connections.detail: ArchiveBox could use lux as a video extraction backend. Both handle media URLs but at different layers -- lux extracts video streams, ArchiveBox archives full pages.
crawl4ai extracts web content for LLMs; lux extracts video/audio streams. Different content types from same URL input pattern.

related_repos.discovery_context: Go YouTube library used as dependency (go.mod)
Python equivalent -- lux is often compared to yt-dlp
